data.name: Furry Sex
data.detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


關於此遊戲

Furry Sex is an erotic memory game featuring furry characters. Flip pairs of cards to reveal sensual artwork and unlock everything.

Features:

- Classic memory match gameplay

- Seductive furry artwork

- Gradually increasing difficulty

- Simple mouse controls and Steam Input support

- Steam trading cards and achievements

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® XP / Vista / 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 500MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
